_note: Global floors (NQ/CL/GC): RTH‚â•60% WR, ETH‚â•58% WR, PF‚â•1.30, Sharpe‚â•0.8. ES uses per-symbol override (symbolFloors) because ES 5-min patterns max out at 54-56% WR ‚Äî same strict floor would leave ES with zero deployed bundles.

ES=F._note: ES-specific ‚Äî updated 2026-05-29. RTH floor lowered 0.55‚Üí0.50 to admit ES VOL_EXPANSION bundles (WR 51-53%, PF 3.4-3.6x). Audit shows ONLY the two VOL_EXPANSION RTH bundles unlock at 50% ‚Äî no other ES RTH bundle passes at <55% WR. ETH stays at 53% (ES ETH VOL_EXPANSION already passes at 53%).

CL=F._note: CL-specific ‚Äî set 2026-05-28. Crude oil mean-reversion + momentum patterns produce 50-58% WR with high PF (3-5x). RTH‚â•55% and ETH‚â•50% with minPF‚â•1.50 admits profitable bundles like RTH_TREND_UP_long (WR=58.1%, PF=5.43) that the 60% global floor rejected. minSharpe lowered to 0.5 since null Sharpe (=not blocking per code) is common in CL bundles.

GC=F._note: GC-specific ‚Äî set 2026-05-29. Gold futures trained on full manual retrain. RTH 0.55 / ETH 0.53 unlocks the ~7 GC bundles with 55-70% WR that the global 0.60 RTH floor was rejecting. minSharpe 0.5 since GC Sharpe values tend to be lower due to wider ATR-based stops.

NQ=F._note: NQ-specific ‚Äî REVISED 2026-06-02. The prior 0.60 RTH floor was STARVING NQ: it benched profitable low-WR/high-PF bundles (RTH VOL_EXPANSION_long WR50%/PF4.77, RTH TREND_DOWN_long 50%/3.12, RTH CHOP_short 53%/2.23, RTH CHOP_long 58%/1.38, ETH TREND_DOWN_long 50%/4.03) ‚Äî the same WR-vs-payoff profile ES/CL/GC got overrides for. Symptom: NQ sat FLAT in CHOP while ES traded. Lowered RTH/ETH to 0.50 + minPF 1.30 + Sharpe 0.5 to admit them. NQ_*_TREND_UP_long stays cut via disabled_bundles.json (proven bleeder, PF 1.17 in replay). Validated by backtest.
